name: workflow state is resumable across process restarts by reading the persisted state file
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf '{"current_state":"build","history":[]}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/show-state.sh" --state-file .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json 2>out.txt && grep -q 'current_state=build' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
